brand.name: VoltEdge Electrical

pricingPlans.name: Emergency Callout
pricingPlans.description: For urgent electrical faults, unsafe wiring concerns, tripped breakers, and outage troubleshooting.

pricingPlans.name: Safety Inspection
pricingPlans.description: A practical electrical health check for homes, apartments, rentals, and small business spaces.

pricingPlans.name: Panel Upgrade Estimate
pricingPlans.description: Planning support for panel replacements, increased capacity, EV circuits, or major rewiring.

processSteps.title: Request a visit
processSteps.description: Call, email, or request an appointment with the issue, preferred time, and property type.

processSteps.title: On-site inspection
processSteps.description: A technician checks the circuit, panel, fixture, or wiring and explains the likely cause.

processSteps.title: Clear quote
processSteps.description: The customer receives a practical repair or installation estimate before approving the work.

processSteps.title: Repair or install
processSteps.description: The approved electrical work is completed with tidy workmanship and minimal disruption.

processSteps.title: Final safety check
processSteps.description: We test the work, clean the area, and confirm everything is operating safely.

projectSignals.title: Residential callouts
projectSignals.description: A clear route for homeowners who need fast help with outlets, panels, breakers, fixtures, or unsafe faults.

projectSignals.title: Commercial maintenance
projectSignals.description: Confident service framing for offices, restaurants, retail units, property managers, and light commercial spaces.

projectSignals.title: Upgrade planning
projectSignals.description: Room for EV circuits, smart-home wiring, lighting redesigns, panel upgrades, and future-ready load checks.

services.title: Residential Electrical
services.description: Fault finding, outlet upgrades, breaker troubleshooting, appliance circuits, and tidy home improvements.

services.title: Commercial Electrical
services.description: Planned and reactive electrical support for offices, retail spaces, hospitality venues, and managed units.

services.title: Emergency Repairs
services.description: Urgent support for outages, tripped breakers, burning smells, faulty panels, and unsafe wiring concerns.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: Interior lighting, exterior security lighting, recessed fixtures, dimmers, and energy-efficient upgrades.

services.title: Electrical Inspections
services.description: Safety checks, buyer inspections, landlord-ready reports, panel reviews, and repair recommendations.

services.title: Smart Home Wiring
services.description: Smart switches, EV-ready circuits, low-voltage planning, network points, and connected-home upgrades.
